name: Endymion's Lab
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>魔法都市の実験施設</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>エンディミオン・ラボ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: This card's name becomes "Magical Citadel of Endymion" while in the Spell & Trap Zone. Each time a Spell Card is activated, place 1 Spell Counter on this card when that Spell resolves. Once per turn, after damage calculation, if your Spellcaster monster is destroyed by battle: You can remove 6 Spell Counters from your field; Special Summon 1 Level 7 or higher Spellcaster monster from your hand or Deck. You can only activate 1 "Endymion's Lab" per turn.
eff: This card's name becomes "Magical Citadel of Endymion" while in the Spell & Trap Zone. Each time a Spell Card is activated, place 1 Spell Counter on this card when that Spell resolves. Once per turn, after damage calculation, if your Spellcaster monster is destroyed by battle: You can remove 6 Spell Counters from your field; Special Summon 1 Level 7 or higher Spellcaster monster from your hand or Deck. You can only activate 1 "Endymion's Lab" per turn.

sets.set: Structure Deck: Order of the Spellcasters

stat_change: Changes own name while on the field
